subcodes.first_line: O Mihr-'Alí! This is the Day whereof all the Prophets and Messengers have made mention, and concerning which they have supplicated the Lord, exalted be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهر علی امروز روزیست که جمیع انبیا و مرسلین ذکر آنرا نموده اند و از حق جل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @chastisement and requital, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
